pt-br.live_hint: Se o instalador lançar a ferramenta interativamente, pressione Ctrl+C ou digite 'exit' para retornar.
pt-br.no_install_cmd: Sem comando de instalação para este sistema.
pt-br.sudo_not_found: sudo não encontrado. Rode como root ou instale sudo.
pt-br.prereq_install_failed: Instalação do pré-requisito falhou. Verifique permissões.
pt-br.invalid_option_tool: Opção inválida. Tente um número ou um dos nomes listados.
pt-br.no_action_cmd: Sem comando de {} para este sistema.
pt-br.npm_prefix_failed: Não foi possível configurar o prefixo npm do usuário.
pt-br.using_sudo: Usando sudo para elevação de permissão.
pt-br.uninstall_but_binary: Desinstalação concluída, mas binário ainda detectado no PATH.
pt-br.installed_but_no_path: Instalado, mas binário não encontrado no PATH.
pt-br.open_new_terminal: Abra um novo terminal para ativar os novos comandos.
pt-br.npm_prefix_redirect: npm: prefixo redirecionado para {} (sem necessidade de sudo)
pt-br.node_old_version: Node.js {} detectado — ferramentas modernas requerem v{}+.
pt-br.node_old_hint: O pacote instala mas falha ao executar (ex.: SyntaxError no runtime).
pt-br.node_updated_reload: Node.js atualizado — recarregue o shell para ativar: {}
pt-br.node_updated_not_detected: Node.js atualizado, mas versão ainda não detectada.
pt-br.git_install_prompt: Deseja instalar o Git agora via winget?
pt-br.git_install_failed: Falha ao instalar o Git automaticamente.
pt-br.git_required_skip: {} não pode ser instalado sem Git. Pulando.
pt-br.git_winget_missing: winget não disponível. Instale o Git manualmente: https://git-scm.com/downloads/win
pt-br.path_added_ok: {} adicionado ao PATH para funcionar corretamente.
pt-br.path_add_failed: Não foi possível atualizar o PATH automaticamente.
pt-br.path_manual_hint: Adicione manualmente: Propriedades do Sistema → Variáveis de Ambiente → PATH do Usuário → Novo
pt-br.press_key: Finalizado! Pressione qualquer tecla para continuar…

en.live_hint: If the installer launches the tool interactively, press Ctrl+C or type 'exit' to return.
en.no_install_cmd: No install command for this system.
en.sudo_not_found: sudo not found. Run as root or install sudo.
en.invalid_option_tool: Invalid option. Try a number or one of the listed names.
en.npm_prefix_failed: Could not configure npm user prefix.
en.uninstall_but_binary: Uninstall completed, but binary still detected in PATH.
en.installed_but_no_path: Installed, but binary not found in PATH.
en.open_new_terminal: Open a new terminal to activate the new commands.
en.npm_prefix_redirect: npm: prefix redirected to {} (no sudo needed)
en.node_old_version: Node.js {} detected — modern tools require v{}+.
en.node_old_hint: Package installs but fails to run (e.g.: SyntaxError at runtime).
en.node_updated_reload: Node.js updated — reload the shell to activate: {}
en.node_updated_not_detected: Node.js updated, but version not yet detected.
en.git_required_skip: {} cannot be installed without Git. Skipping.
en.git_winget_missing: winget not available. Install Git manually: https://git-scm.com/downloads/win
en.path_added_ok: {} added to PATH to work correctly.
en.path_manual_hint: Add manually: System Properties → Environment Variables → User PATH → New
en.press_key: Done! Press any key to continue…

linux.debian: apt-get update && apt-get install -y nodejs npm

codex.author: OpenAI
codex.description: Agente de codificação autônomo que opera diretamente no terminal
codex.description_en: Autonomous coding agent that operates directly in the terminal

claude.author: Anthropic
claude.description: CLI oficial do Claude Code com acesso total ao ambiente de desenvolvimento
claude.description_en: Official Claude Code CLI with full access to the development environment

uninstall.windows: winget uninstall -e --id Anthropic.Claude || winget uninstall -e --id Claude.Claude || true

opencode.author: SST / Dax
opencode.description: Assistente de código open source com suporte a múltiplos modelos de IA
opencode.description_en: Open source code assistant with multi-model AI support

uninstall.all: npm uninstall -g opencode-ai || bun remove -g opencode-ai || true

copilot.author: GitHub / Microsoft
copilot.description: Assistente de código com integração nativa ao ecossistema GitHub
copilot.description_en: Code assistant with native GitHub ecosystem integration

uninstall.macos: npm uninstall -g @github/copilot || (command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && gh extension remove github/gh-copilot) || true
uninstall.linux: npm uninstall -g @github/copilot || (command -v gh >/dev/null 2>&1 && gh extension remove github/gh-copilot) || true

cody.author: Sourcegraph
cody.description: CLI do Cody para chat e automação de código no terminal
cody.description_en: Cody CLI for chat and code automation in the terminal

kilocode.author: Kilo Code
kilocode.description: Fork open source do Cline com funcionalidades extras e sem limites de uso
kilocode.description_en: Open source Cline fork with extra features and no usage limits

gemini.author: Google
gemini.description: CLI do Gemini com acesso aos modelos Google e integração com Google Search
gemini.description_en: Gemini CLI with access to Google models and Google Search integration

kimi.author: Moonshot AI
kimi.description: CLI do Kimi para codificação e automação no terminal com suporte a ACP/MCP
kimi.description_en: Kimi CLI for coding and terminal automation with ACP/MCP support

upgrade.macos: uv tool upgrade kimi-cli --no-cache || curl -LsSf https://code.kimi.com/install.sh | bash
upgrade.linux: uv tool upgrade kimi-cli --no-cache || curl -LsSf https://code.kimi.com/install.sh | bash

qwen.author: Alibaba Cloud
qwen.description: Assistente de código da família Qwen com foco em tarefas de longa duração
qwen.description_en: Code assistant from the Qwen family focused on long-running tasks

install.windows: curl.exe -fsSL -o "$env:TEMP\install-qwen.bat" https://qwen-code-assets.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/installation/install-qwen.bat; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 1 }; & "$env:TEMP\install-qwen.bat" --source qwenchat 2>&1 | Out-Host; if ((Test-Path "$env:APPDATA\npm\qwen.cmd") -or (Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Qwen\qwen.exe") -or (Get-Command qwen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { exit 0 } else { exit 1 }

uninstall.windows: if (Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Qwen\uninstall.exe") { & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\Programs\Qwen\uninstall.exe" /S } elseif (Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\Qwen\uninstall.exe") { & "$env:ProgramFiles\Qwen\uninstall.exe" /S }; $npmPrefix = (npm prefix -g 2>$null); foreach ($name in @('qwen','qwen-code','@qwen/code','qwenchat')) { npm uninstall -g $name 2>$null }; foreach ($ext in @('.cmd','.ps1','')) { $stub = "$npmPrefix\qwen$ext"; if (Test-Path $stub) { Remove-Item $stub -Force } }; exit 0

groq.author: Groq
groq.description: CLI de codificação com inferência ultrarrápida via hardware LPU da Groq
groq.description_en: Coding CLI with ultra-fast inference via Groq LPU hardware

openhands.author: All Hands AI
openhands.description: Agente de software autônomo capaz de executar tarefas complexas de desenvolvimento
openhands.description_en: Autonomous software agent capable of executing complex development tasks

cline.author: Cline Bot
cline.description: Agente autônomo com acesso ao sistema de arquivos, terminal e navegador
cline.description_en: Autonomous agent with filesystem, terminal and browser access

forgecode.author: Forge
forgecode.description: CLI de codificação com integração nativa ao shell e fluxo conversacional
forgecode.description_en: Coding CLI with native shell integration and conversational flow

crush.author: Charmbracelet
crush.description: Agente de codificação com interface TUI elegante no terminal
crush.description_en: Coding agent with elegant TUI interface in the terminal

grok.author: xAI
grok.description: CLI do Grok com acesso aos modelos xAI e raciocínio avançado
grok.description_en: Grok CLI with access to xAI models and advanced reasoning

configure.prompt_en: Paste your GROK_API_KEY (get it at https://console.x.ai):

cursor.author: Anysphere
cursor.description: Editor de código com IA integrada, baseado no VS Code
cursor.description_en: AI-powered code editor based on VS Code

install.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/darwin-${ARCH}/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.dmg && hdiutil attach /tmp/cursor.dmg -quiet && cp -R "/Volumes/Cursor/Cursor.app" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "/Volumes/Cursor" -quiet && rm /tmp/cursor.dmg

linux.debian: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/linux-${ARCH}-deb/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/cursor.deb && rm /tmp/cursor.deb
linux.fedora: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/linux-${ARCH}-rpm/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.rpm && sudo rpm -i /tmp/cursor.rpm && rm /tmp/cursor.rpm

upgrade.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/darwin-${ARCH}/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.dmg && hdiutil attach /tmp/cursor.dmg -quiet && cp -R "/Volumes/Cursor/Cursor.app" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "/Volumes/Cursor" -quiet && rm /tmp/cursor.dmg

linux.debian: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/linux-${ARCH}-deb/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/cursor.deb && rm /tmp/cursor.deb
linux.fedora: ARCH=$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/x64/;s/aarch64/arm64/') && curl -fsSL "https://api2.cursor.sh/updates/download/golden/linux-${ARCH}-rpm/cursor/stable" -o /tmp/cursor.rpm && sudo rpm -i /tmp/cursor.rpm && rm /tmp/cursor.rpm

linux.debian: sudo apt-get remove -y cursor || sudo dpkg -r cursor || true
linux.fedora: sudo dnf remove -y cursor || sudo rpm -e cursor || true

zed.author: Zed Industries
zed.description: Editor de código de alta performance com colaboração e IA
zed.description_en: High-performance code editor with collaboration and AI

upgrade.windows: winget upgrade -e --id ZedIndustries.Zed || winget install -e --id ZedIndustries.Zed
upgrade.macos: brew upgrade --cask zed || brew install --cask zed

uninstall.macos: brew uninstall --cask zed || true && rm -rf "/Applications/Zed.app" && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/zed"

trae.author: ByteDance / Trae
trae.description: IDE com agentes de IA integrada e modo Builder para automação de tarefas
trae.description_en: IDE with integrated AI agents and Builder mode for task automation

install.windows: $json = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest'; $list = $json.data.manifest.win32.download; $pref = @('va','sg','usttp','cn'); $entry = $null; foreach ($r in $pref) { $entry = $list | Where-Object { $_.region -eq $r } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($entry) { break } }; if (-not $entry) { $entry = $list[0] }; $url = $entry.'x64'; $out = "$env:TEMP\Trae-Setup-x64.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out; Start-Process -FilePath $out -Wait
install.macos: CHIP=$([ "$(uname -m)" = "x86_64" ] && echo intel || echo apple) && URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.darwin.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "$CHIP") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/trae.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'Trae.app' | head -n1) && [ -z "$APP_SRC" ] && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'TRAE.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/trae.dmg

linux.debian: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.deb") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/trae.deb && rm /tmp/trae.deb
linux.fedora: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.rpm") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.rpm && sudo rpm -Uvh --replacepkgs /tmp/trae.rpm && rm /tmp/trae.rpm
linux.arch: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.tar.gz") && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" "$HOME/.local/bin" && tar -xzf "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'Trae' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'trae' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.default: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.tar.gz") && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" "$HOME/.local/bin" && tar -xzf "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'Trae' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'trae' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$TMP"

upgrade.windows: $json = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest'; $list = $json.data.manifest.win32.download; $pref = @('va','sg','usttp','cn'); $entry = $null; foreach ($r in $pref) { $entry = $list | Where-Object { $_.region -eq $r } | Select-Object -First 1; if ($entry) { break } }; if (-not $entry) { $entry = $list[0] }; $url = $entry.'x64'; $out = "$env:TEMP\Trae-Setup-x64.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $out; Start-Process -FilePath $out -Wait
upgrade.macos: CHIP=$([ "$(uname -m)" = "x86_64" ] && echo intel || echo apple) && URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.darwin.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "$CHIP") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/trae.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'Trae.app' | head -n1) && [ -z "$APP_SRC" ] && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'TRAE.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/trae.dmg

linux.debian: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.deb") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/trae.deb && rm /tmp/trae.deb
linux.fedora: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.rpm") && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/trae.rpm && sudo rpm -Uvh --replacepkgs /tmp/trae.rpm && rm /tmp/trae.rpm
linux.arch: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.tar.gz") && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" "$HOME/.local/bin" && tar -xzf "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'Trae' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'trae' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.default: URL=$(node -e "fetch('https://icube-normal.trae.ai/icube/api/v1/native/version/trae/latest').then(r=>r.json()).then(j=>{const d=j.data.manifest.linux.download; const p=['va','sg','usttp','cn']; const e=p.map(r=>d.find(x=>x.region===r)).find(Boolean)||d[0]; console.log(e[process.argv[1]]);})" "x64.tar.gz") && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" "$HOME/.local/bin" && tar -xzf "$TMP/trae.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'Trae' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/trae" -type f -name 'trae' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$TMP"

uninstall.windows: winget uninstall -e --id ByteDance.Trae || winget uninstall -e --id Trae.Trae || true

linux.debian: sudo apt-get remove -y trae || sudo dpkg -r trae || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/trae"
linux.fedora: sudo dnf remove -y trae || sudo rpm -e trae || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/trae" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/trae"

opencode-desktop.author: Anomaly
opencode-desktop.description: OpenCode Desktop (Beta) para uso do agente em interface gráfica
opencode-desktop.description_en: OpenCode Desktop (Beta) for agent use in graphical interface

install.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m) && URL=$([ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ] && echo 'https://opencode.ai/download/stable/darwin-x64-dmg' || echo 'https://opencode.ai/download/stable/darwin-aarch64-dmg') && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name '*.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg

upgrade.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m) && URL=$([ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ] && echo 'https://opencode.ai/download/stable/darwin-x64-dmg' || echo 'https://opencode.ai/download/stable/darwin-aarch64-dmg') && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name '*.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/opencode-desktop.dmg

uninstall.windows: winget uninstall -e --id Anomaly.OpenCodeDesktop || winget uninstall -e --id OpenCode.OpenCodeDesktop || true

linux.debian: sudo apt-get remove -y opencode-desktop opencode || sudo dpkg -r opencode-desktop opencode || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/opencode-desktop"
linux.fedora: sudo dnf remove -y opencode-desktop opencode || sudo rpm -e opencode-desktop opencode || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/opencode-desktop"

windsurf.author: Codeium / Windsurf
windsurf.description: IDE agentic com fluxo colaborativo de IA para desenvolvimento
windsurf.description_en: Agentic IDE with collaborative AI flow for development

install.windows: $html = (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://windsurf.com/editor/releases').Content; $m = [regex]::Match($html, 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/win32-x64-user/stable/[^"''\\]+\.exe'); if (-not $m.Success) { throw 'URL de download não encontrada' }; $out = "$env:TEMP\WindsurfUserSetup-x64.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $m.Value -OutFile $out; Start-Process -FilePath $out -Wait
install.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m) && PATTERN=$([ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ] && echo 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/darwin-x64-dmg/stable/[^" ]+\.dmg' || echo 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/darwin-arm64-dmg/stable/[^" ]+\.dmg') && URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE "$PATTERN" | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/windsurf.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/windsurf.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'Windsurf.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/windsurf.dmg

linux.debian: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64-deb/stable/[^" ]+\.deb' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/windsurf.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/windsurf.deb && rm /tmp/windsurf.deb
linux.fedora: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.arch: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.default: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"

upgrade.windows: $html = (Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://windsurf.com/editor/releases').Content; $m = [regex]::Match($html, 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/win32-x64-user/stable/[^"''\\]+\.exe'); if (-not $m.Success) { throw 'URL de download não encontrada' }; $out = "$env:TEMP\WindsurfUserSetup-x64.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $m.Value -OutFile $out; Start-Process -FilePath $out -Wait
upgrade.macos: ARCH=$(uname -m) && PATTERN=$([ "$ARCH" = "x86_64" ] && echo 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/darwin-x64-dmg/stable/[^" ]+\.dmg' || echo 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/darwin-arm64-dmg/stable/[^" ]+\.dmg') && URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE "$PATTERN" | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/windsurf.dmg && MNT=$(hdiutil attach /tmp/windsurf.dmg -quiet | awk '/\/Volumes\//{print $3; exit}') && APP_SRC=$(find "$MNT" -maxdepth 2 -name 'Windsurf.app' | head -n1) && [ -n "$APP_SRC" ] && cp -R "$APP_SRC" /Applications/ && hdiutil detach "$MNT" -quiet && rm /tmp/windsurf.dmg

linux.debian: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64-deb/stable/[^" ]+\.deb' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o /tmp/windsurf.deb && sudo dpkg -i /tmp/windsurf.deb && rm /tmp/windsurf.deb
linux.fedora: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.arch: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"
linux.default: URL=$(curl -fsSL https://windsurf.com/editor/releases | grep -oE 'https://windsurf-stable\.codeiumdata\.com/linux-x64/stable/[^" ]+\.tar\.gz' | head -n1) && [ -n "$URL" ] && TMP=$(mktemp -d) && curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" "$HOME/.local/bin" && rm -rf "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf/"* && tar -xzf "$TMP/windsurf.tar.gz" -C "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name 'Windsurf' | head -n1) && [ -z "$BIN" ] && BIN=$(find "$HOME/.local/opt/windsurf" -type f -name '*.AppImage' | head -n1) && [ -n "$BIN" ] && chmod +x "$BIN" && ln -sf "$BIN" "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf" && rm -rf "$TMP"

uninstall.windows: winget uninstall -e --id Codeium.Windsurf || winget uninstall -e --id Windsurf.Windsurf || true

linux.debian: sudo apt-get remove -y windsurf || sudo dpkg -r windsurf || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf"
linux.fedora: sudo dnf remove -y windsurf || sudo rpm -e windsurf || true && rm -f "$HOME/.local/bin/windsurf"
